arguments.task: Research the Harvest API from official first-party pages. Open the Harvest API docs and related official pages to verify: one-line product description, authentication methods, whether access is self-serve or gated and any pricing/access requirement, API surface type and breadth, rate limits, and whether there is any official MCP server or first-party MCP mention. Prefer developer docs, help center, pricing, and official GitHub pages. Return concise extracted findings with the exact page URLs used. Do not use third-party blogs unless no official source exists for MCP, in which case you may check the official GitHub organization or MCP registry listing and note that it is not first-party docs.

input.thought: Use the browser tool to inspect official Harvest docs and related first-party pages for verifiable app research evidence.

raw_result.description: Harvest is time tracking software with invoicing and reporting that exposes an API for accounts, users, clients, projects, tasks, time entries, invoices, expenses, estimates, roles, and reports.
raw_result.auth_notes: Harvest API v2 documents OAuth 2.0 for integrations and personal access tokens for personal scripts or testing; requests also require a Harvest-Account-Id header.
raw_result.gating_reason: Public API v2 docs are openly available and authentication can be self-served via OAuth app registration or personal access tokens from a Harvest account, with no evidence gathered of partner or sales gating for initial API access.

api_surface.breadth: Well-documented REST API v2 covering core Harvest resources including users, clients, contacts, roles, projects, task assignments, time entries, expense categories, expenses, invoices, estimates, users, and reports.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official first-party MCP server or Model Context Protocol documentation was verified in the gathered evidence; absence is uncertain and should be human-reviewed.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Harvest API v2 general limit is 100 requests per 15 seconds; Reports API limit is 100 requests per 15 minutes.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official help center hosts comprehensive API v2 documentation; auth supports both OAuth 2.0 and personal access tokens; docs explicitly describe account-scoped headers and rate limiting, which is sufficient to build a first toolkit.
raw_result.human_review_reason: MCP availability could not be conclusively verified from first-party evidence already gathered, and pricing-page evidence for whether an active paid Harvest subscription is required to actually use the API was not fully confirmed from the extracted content.
